items.h: AEW Dynamite ratings take hit against NBA Finals
items.p: This past Wednesday’s AEW Dynamite averaged 638,000 viewers on TBS, down 9.4% from the previous week but was still the second-largest audience for the show in nearly two months. The episode...

items.p: MJF might have suffered an injury on "AEW Dynamite," but the AEW World Champion should be healthy enough to compete at Forbidden Door.

items.h: Indie Promotion PRODUCE Joins MyAEW, Announces First Show Curated By Jonathan Gresham
items.p: MyAEW is an international streaming platform for AEW and ROH. It will now be the home to two indie promotions, including new promotion, PRODUCE Wrestling.
